---
applyTo: ".github/instructions/**,.github/skills/**/SKILL.md"
description: Use when authoring or reviewing description fields for CSO content-pattern compliance.
---

## CSO Content-Pattern Exemplars

### ✅ Good Descriptions

- `Use when reviewing code for incomplete implementations or placeholder stubs.`
- `Apply when the user mentions security, supply chain, or dependency risk.`
- `Run when validating gate readiness before phase transition.`
- `Invoke when the user asks for a structured retrospective.`

### ❌ Bad Descriptions

- `Generates a stub-scan report and validates implementation completeness.`
  — contains workflow verbs (`generates`, `validates`)
- `Stub scanning skill for code review.`
  — missing trigger phrase (`Use when`, `Apply when`, etc.)
- `Creates and runs gate validation checks for all phases.`
  — contains workflow verbs (`creates`, `runs`)
- `Build a context bridge between phases.`
  — contains workflow verb (`build`), missing trigger phrase
